corrective_action: Adjusted the formula by adding more Stevia and flavor. Client would like less sweet. Adjusted the formula in the opposite direction and added all ingredients except Citric Acid and coloring. Client is satisfied with the product.

complaint_text: The stick pack film was wound the wrong direction.
corrective_action: Empire took film to a shop to have it wound the correct way.

complaint_text: The stick pack film did not have a tear notch.
corrective_action: Return the product to manufacturing and add the tear notch.

complaint_text: ProDough's customer found a plastic piece and what appeared to be 'white powder' in their protein bag.
corrective_action: Updated and re-define batching processes with the team to improve the sifting process. Discussed interval checks with QA department as well as the use of a new X-Ray machine on finished goods.

complaint_text: Customer was concerned about differences between 2 separate lab test results for the same product.
corrective_action: Re-tested the blend sample. Reviewed results with the QA team and the client. Confirmed test results from the client. Client was looking at the wrong test results which gave the indication of errors, but the results were similar enough when we looked at the correct test results.

complaint_text: Customer thought that we were filling sticks about the fill weight range when she saw the total quantity of finished goods we sent to her fulfillment center.
corrective_action: We were within the customers fill weight range of 1.1-1.3g. Most of the sticks were filled to 1.2g (within range), but her calculations were based on 1.15g fill weight so she expected a higher quantity of finished goods. We are currently working by passing all our products through the x-ray machine, to ensure that our product arrives in excellent condition, additionally we sift all of our ingredients before filling. We do manual filling where people NOT machines are the ones that pack our product minimizing the risk of foreign materials in the mix.

complaint_text: The customer found a sheared piece of metal in the cooked waffle. They sent a picture.
investigation: Lot was produced prior X-ray. At the moment of running the product only sifting was in place. There are not magnets in the sifter.
corrective_action: We are currently working by passing all our products through the x-ray machine, to ensure that our product arrives in excellent condition, additionally we sift all of our ingredients before filling. We do manual filling where people NOT machines are the ones that pack our product minimizing the risk of foreign materials in the mix.

complaint_text: A customer found a Lady bug on a protein pouch.
investigation: QA departments had to do investigation on the test results we received then and the results passed, we looked for X-ray log to see if we found any abnormalities during the run. Pest control has come to do their routines inspections.
corrective_action: Implementing more preventative steps meanwhile a product is running.
